# `Nop`

**Systems:** X16,C128, C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, VIC20, PET, NES, OK64, ATARI2600, APPLEII, SNES, ORIC, BBCM, ACORN, ATARI800, AMSTRADCPC, VZ200 , X86, M1ARM, AMIGA, ATARI520ST, M6809, Z80, Z180  
**Parameters:** `n`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>Nop( [number] );
</h3>
<ul>
<li>[number] - Inserts this number of nop instructions.</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Inserts [parameter 1] amount of "nop".</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
    nop(3); // the same as asm (" nop nop nop ");
</code>


</div>
